DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION my_filter_function CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION my_filter_function RESTRICT;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION public.my_filter_function CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION my_function_name CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION schema_name.my_filter_function CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION my_complex_filter_function CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION another_function_name RESTRICT;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION user_schema.my_function_name CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.my_filter_function RESTRICT;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION test_schema.my_filter_function CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION my_filter_function WHERE column_value > 10 CASCADE;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION my_filter_function CASCADE WITH DEFINITION;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION my_nested_filter_function RESET;
DROP ALL FILTER FUNCTION (SELECT func_name FROM sys.functions WHERE type = 4) CASCADE;
